item.title: 890 Million YA
item.description: Oort Cloud Comet Cluster First Entry (Current Periodicity: 3600 years): Pictograph , spirograph biggest one being 900 miles Session Date: Oct 07, 1994 Q: (L) How long has this comet ...

item.title: 350K YA
item.description: Landing Strip on Moon Session Date: Jan 22, 2000 Q: Now, we have this picture of this sort of “track” on the Moon here. It is 29 KM long and about 1 KM wide, and they are calling it a “landing strip.” Well, it’s pretty big to be a landing strip, in my opinion.

item.title: 3 Billion YA
item.description: Events Birth of Moon from Earth (Cometary interaction). Session Quotes Session Date: October 22, 1994 Q: (L) When and how did planet earth acquire its moon? A: Was caused by the regular passage of a large comet cluster which caused a gravitational disruption allowing a large chunk of the original earth’s surface, which was somewhat less solid at that point in space/time, to break away from the main body and assume a locked in orbit around the main body.

item.title: 27 Million YA
item.description: Once scientists had discovered that the Great Dyings occurred inexorably like clockwork, there was a lot of sweating going on to figure out when, where, how and why ...

item.title: 28.2 Million YA
item.description: Session Date: Jan 30, 2010 (Ark) 1998 [session about] sun’s companion. So, I asked the question: how close would it come, and the answer was, “Distance depends upon other factors, such as intersecting orbit of locator of witness”.

item.title: 130K YA
item.description: 130K YA Planting of Jews in Middle East ( By Lizards/4D STS) Session Date: May 31, 1997 Q: Were the Jews that were genetically engineered and then planted in the Middle East… what year ...

item.title: 100K YA
item.description: 100K YA Session Date: Jul 11, 1998 Q: (A) What is the period of pole shift? A: 100,000 years, roughly. Session Date: Jul 11, 1998 Q: (A) We have been told that there is going to be a change of the magnetic field of the earth.

item.title: 8K BCE
item.description: 8K BCE Stonehenge - Built by Druids (Energy Redirector) Session Date: Aug 22, 1998 Q: Then you talked about the pyramid as a focuser of energy to do ‘all things’ or many things ...
